---
title: "Contact"
---

# Contact

Thank you for visiting my portfolio. I am open to networking, internships, and opportunities related to cybersecurity, governance, privacy, risk, and compliance.

## Get in Touch

- **Email:** your.email@email.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/your-profile
- **Portfolio:** https://brunoaureliogb.github.io/Portfolio/
- **Location:** Metro Vancouver, British Columbia

## Let’s Connect

I would be glad to connect with professionals, recruiters, classmates, and organizations interested in cybersecurity, governance, privacy, and business-oriented risk management.
